name: @devx/repo-root
description: Repo-root tooling host for devx (the project building devx). Currently exists only to run the cfg201 schema smoke test and the cfg202 config-io round-trip suite until cli301 establishes the proper @devx/cli package layout — at that point this file is consumed by the package scaffold and these devDependencies migrate there.

scripts.test: node test/schema-smoke.mjs && tsx test/config-io.test.ts && tsx test/config-validate.test.ts
